name: BINIversus
overview:
Unscripted, chaotic, and loads of fun—sounds like #BINI's first-ever variety show!

BLOOMS, welcome to #BINIversus!

Join Aiah, Colet, Maloi, Gwen, Stacey, Mikha, Jhoanna, and Sheena battle it out in each of their BINIverses!

trailers.title: BINI's First Variety Show: BINIversus! (Official Trailer)
